Chronology
2024 in KSW 2025 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki 2026 in KSW

The year 2025 was the 21st year in the history of the Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Poland. 2025 began with KSW 102.

List of events

[edit]

XTB KSW 102: Przybysz vs. Azevedo

[edit]
XTB KSW 102: Przybysz vs. Azevedo
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateJanuary 25, 2025
VenueRadom Sports Center
City Radom

XTB KSW 102: Przybysz vs. Azevedo was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on January 25, 2025, at the Radom Sports Center in Radom, Poland.

Background

[edit]

On December 16, 2024, the KSW organization announced the termination of cooperation with champion Jakub Wikłacz and the termination of the contract with him by mutual consent of the parties. After the current champion, Jakub Wikłacz, left KSW, Przybysz will fight once again for the bantamweight championship belt on January 25, 2025, during XTB KSW 102 in Radom. His opponent will be Brazilian Bruno Azevedo, ranked 2nd in the ranking.[1]

Bonus awards

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Andi Vrtačić vs. Cezary Kęsik
  • Submission of the Night: Piotr Kacprzak
  • Knockout of the Night: Muslim Tulshaev

Fight card

[edit]
XTB KSW 102
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Bantamweight 61 kg Sebastian Przybysz def. Bruno Azevedo Decision (Unanimous) 5 5:00 For the KSW Bantamweight Championship.
Featherweight 66 kg Patryk Kaczmarczyk def. Ahmed Vila Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Middleweight 84 kg Radosław Paczuski def. Kleber Raimundo Silva Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Featherweight 66 kg Adam Soldaev def. Daniel Tărchilă Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Welterweight 77 kg Muslim Tulshaev def. Daniel Skibiński KO (Punch) 2 1:41
Women's Flyweight 56 kg Wiktoria Czyżewska def. Adrianna Kreft Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Catchweight 87 kg Andi Vrtačić def. Cezary Kęsik TKO (Spinning Back Fist and Punches) 2 4:33
Preliminary card (YouTube)
Featherweight 66 kg Piotr Kacprzak def. Julio Cesar Neves Submission (Triangle Choke) 3 2:19
Heavyweight 120 kg Miha Frlić def. Kamil Gawryjołek TKO (Punches) 1 2:12

XTB KSW 103: Brichta vs. Charzewski

[edit]
XTB KSW 103: Brichta vs. Charzewski
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateFebruary 21, 2025
VenueHome Credit Arena
City Liberec

XTB KSW 103: Brichta vs. Charzewski was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on February 21, 2025, at the Home Credit Arena in Liberec, Czech Republic.

Background

[edit]

On February 21, 2025, the KSW brand will return to the Czech Republic. The XTB KSW 103 will take place in Liberec, where the KSW organization has already appeared twice. Famous Czech names are scheduled to appear in the main fights of the evening: Leo Brichta, Dominik Humburger and Josef Štummer. Brichta, who has previously fought in the lightweight category, is to make his debut in the featherweight category during the XTB KSW 103. The event will take place at the Home Credit Arena.[2]

Bonus awards

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Dominik Humburger vs. Borys Dzikowski
  • Submission of the Night: Oleksii Polischuck
  • Knockout of the Night: Josef Štummer

Fight card

[edit]
XTB KSW 103
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Featherweight 66 kg Leo Brichta def. Łukasz Charzewski TKO (Punches) 1 2:33
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Damian Piwowarczyk def. Bartosz Szewczyk TKO (Punches) 1 3:10
Middleweight 84 kg Dominik Humburger def. Borys Dzikowski Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Weltetweight 77 kg Krystian Kaszubowski def. Matúš Juráček Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00

Catchweight 79 kg Henry Fadipe def. Steven Krt Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Catchweight 72 kg Welisson Paiva def. Dawid Śmiełowski Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Preliminary card (YouTube)
Catchweight 79 kg Jacek Gać def. Samuel Bily TKO (Punches) 1 3:07
Featherweight 66 kg Josef Štummer def. Nacim Belhouachi KO (Punch) 1 2:02

XTB KSW 104: Kuberski vs. Romanowski

[edit]
XTB KSW 104
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateMarch 8, 2025
VenueArena Gorzów
City Gorzów Wielkopolski

XTB KSW 104: Kuberski vs. Romanowski was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on March 8, 2025, at the Arena Gorzów in Gorzów Wielkopolski. Poland.

Background

[edit]

During the KSW event in 2025, the organization will come to Gorzów Wielkopolski for the second time in history. In the evening fight, which will follow the fight for the interim championship belt, a fight between rivals famous for their strong, uncompromising battles. Piotr Kuberski (15–1, 13 KO), number two in the ranking, will face Tomasz Romanowski (18–10 1NC, 7 KO, 1 Sub), number four. The XTB KSW 104 will take place on March 8 at the Arena Gorzów.[3]

Bonus awards

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Piotr Kuberski vs. Tomasz Romanowski
  • Submission of the Night: Ewelina Woźniak
  • Knockout of the Night: Sergiusz Zając

Fight card

[edit]

Weight Class Method Round Time Notes

Preliminary card (YouTube)

Heavyweight 120 kg Marek Samociuk def. Filip Stawowy Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
